name: Clear-Wait: alternatives much worse (45-50% premium + HIGH uncertainty) + 15-day cover
rubric_notes: 5-day delay vs 360h (15-day) cover. Both alternatives have HIGH uncertainty AND 45-50% cost premium — switching is the wrong call by every dimension. No customer orders at risk. The right system behavior is explicit rejection: 'we considered switching, but the alternatives are worse.' Confidence HIGH — Advocate has no defensible case. acceptable_suppliers is intentionally empty because the rubric says no supplier should be recommended in a wait-and-monitor scenario.
